title: Network right * abundant semigroups
summary: We introduce the class of network right $*$-abundant semigroups. These are based on networks that extend the notion of a directed graph. This class properly contains the class of graph inverse semigroups. We investigate the structure of network right $*$-abundant semigroups. We show that two network right $*$-abundant semigroups are isomorphic if and only if the underlying networks are isomorphic.
